hypothesis: Integrating a learned per-atom charge-equilibration head conditioned on total system charge together with a differentiable Ewald-summed Coulomb term into a MACE force field in the mlip library will reduce the error in the simulated static dielectric constant of solvated amino acid systems by at least 30% and halve the NVE total-energy drift (meV/atom/ns) over 1 ns compared to the same architecture using only a 5 Å short-range cutoff without explicit long-range electrostatics.
